name: 20 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP
about: 20 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is a type of general medicine that comes in a tablet form. It contains 20 mg of Olmesartan Medoxomil, which is used to treat hypertension (high blood pressure) in adults. The tablets are packed in a quantity of 10x15 tablets per box and are manufactured in India. The dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is recommended to store these tablets in a cool place.

faq.q: What is 20 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP used for?
faq.a: 20 MG Olmesartan Medoxomil Tablets IP is used to treat hypertension (high blood pressure) in adults.

faq.q: How should I take this medicine?
faq.a: The dosage of the medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: How many tablets are there in one box?

faq.a: These tablets are manufactured in India.

faq.q: What are the storage instructions for these tablets?
faq.a: It is recommended to store these tablets in a cool place.
